title: Tilray Brands to Expand Into the U.S. Marijuana Market? Why You Shouldn't Count on That Anytime Soon
text: While Tilray may expand into the U.S. marijuana market, investors shouldn't count on that happening anytime soon. Despite federal rescheduling of cannabis, significant barriers remain for Canadian producers entering the U.S. market. State-level regulations, federal-state conflicts, and the lack of full legalization continue to present challenges. Tilray should focus on maximizing opportunities in existing international markets and the Canadian market in the near term.
